description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with default image node:latest and stages pages and dependency_scanning. Add a pages job in the pages stage that runs only on the master branch, uses npm to install dependencies (npm ci) and build the production site (npm run build --prod), moves the build output to a public directory (mv build public) and publishes the public/ folder as an artifact. Add a dependency_scanning job in the dependency_scanning stage that runs on all branches when $GITLAB_FEATURES enables dependency_scanning and $DEPENDENCY_SCANNING_DISABLED is not set, uses the docker:stable image with a docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and disables TLS, exports DS_VERSION, defines a propagate_env_vars function, and runs a docker container of the GitLab dependency‑scanning analyzer with the code mounted and Docker socket bound, producing a gl-dependency-scanning-report.json artifact and allowing failure. Include the official Dependency-Scanning.gitlab-ci.yml template and ensure the pages job only runs on master while the dependency_scanning job follows the specified rules.
